title: Citizenship and Immigration Services Overview | Homeland Security

- Citizenship and Immigration

## Citizenship and Immigration Services Overview
U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) oversees lawful immigration to the United States. USCIS upholds America’s promise as a nation of welcome and possibility with fairness, integrity, and respect for all we serve.
- Use the USCIS Case Status tool to track the status of an immigration application, petition, or request. Check Case Status
Use the USCIS Case Status tool to track the status of an immigration application, petition, or request.
- The USCIS Contact Center gives several ways to track cases and answer immigration questions. USCIS Contact Center
The USCIS Contact Center gives several ways to track cases and answer immigration questions.
USCIS consists of 19,000 employees and contractors from 200 offices across the world who oversee lawful immigration to the United States. Our number one goal is strengthening the security and integrity of the immigration system through efficient and consistent adjudications of benefits, fraud detection, and enhanced customer service. USCIS promotes flexible and sound immigration policies and programs as well as immigrant participation in American civic culture.
In this era of increased global threats and national security challenges, we will remain mindful of our duty to provide immigration service in a manner that strengthens the nation. We carefully manage every aspect of our immigration mission so that new immigrants and citizens can experience the privileges and advantages of lawful presence in the United States.
- Citizenship and Immigration Services
